en: This isn't a steak. Why would you call it that on your menu?
I don't know what to tell you, man.
Just give me all the bacon and eggs you have.
Wait, wait. I worry what you just heard was, give me a lot of bacon and eggs.
ko: 내가 방금 한 말은 베이컨과 계란을 많이 달라는 거야.

en: What I said was, give me all the bacon and eggs you have.
ko: 내가 한 말은, 네가 가진 모든 베이컨과 계란을 달라는 거야.
